channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: GOP Armed Services chair criticizes ban on gender-affirming care for minors in NDAA
item.description: House Armed Services Committee Chair Mike Rogers (R-Ala.) on Tuesday lamented the inclusion of a provision banning coverage of gender-affirming care for minors in the annual defense authorization bill, saying that Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) did not consult him about it.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: US inflation ticked up last month as some price pressures remain persistent
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Fueled by pricier used cars, hotel rooms and groceries, inflation in the United States moved slightly higher last month in the latest sign that some price pressures remain elevated.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTOPHER RUGABER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Former Democratic Rep. Anthony Weiner, convicted of illicit contact with minor, files to run for NYC Council
item.description: Disgraced former Democrat Congressman Anthony Weiner, whose once-promising career was seemingly destroyed by sexting scandals, is eyeing a political comeback.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Live: Blinken testifying at committee hearing on Afghanistan withdrawal
item.description: Lawmakers have been demanding answers into how such a significant operation could have gone so wrong.
item.dc:creator: Elina Shirazi, NewsNation

item.title: Biden approves national security memo on China, Iran, North Korea and Russia ahead of Trump's return
item.description: President Joe Biden has approved a new national security memorandum that could serve as a road map for the incoming Trump administration as it looks to counter growing cooperation among China, Iran, North Korea and Russia.
item.dc:creator: Aamer Madhani, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: A kinder, gentler Trump? President-elect taking a more moderate stance
item.description: The second Trump presidency may be marked by a softer, more moderate persona though how long "Trump 2.0" might last is anyone's guess.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump announces more picks, nominates Kimberly Guilfoyle to serve as ambassador to Greece
item.description: President-elect Trump on Tuesday made several announcements of appointments and nominations as he continues to fill out his incoming administration
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hegseth makes play to win hard-to-get GOP centrists
item.description: Pete Hegseth is looking to win over a pair of key Republican moderates as he tries to keep his hopes of leading the Defense Department from being derailed. The former Fox News host huddled with Sen. Lisa Murkowski (R-Alaska) on Tuesday and is set to do the same on Wednesday with Sen.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NJ bill looks to make doxxing a crime
item.description: TRENTON, N.J. (PIX11) - When someone is doxxed, it can be more than just a leak of their information; it can rob someone of their well-being, physically and mentally.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vasil, PIX 11

item.title: Florida state lawmaker files measure eliminating tuition aid for undocumented immigrants
item.description: Florida state Sen. Randy Fine (R) announced Monday he was introducing a bill to limit college tuition aid to undocumented immigrants.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, Fox 5

item.title: Israel's UN ambassador insists nation is 'not getting involved' in Syrian regime change
item.description: A top Israeli diplomat insisted his nation is "not getting involved" in Syria’s politics after the nation launched an aggressive campaign of airstrikes and seized control of a buffer zone in Syria.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: David Valadao elected chair of Republican Governance Group
item.description: Rep. David Valadao (R-Calif.) was elected chair of the Republican Governance Group, a House GOP caucus that trends to the center ideologically, after current chair, Rep. Dave Joyce (R-Ohio), opted to step down to foster new leadership in the group.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bragg lays out alternatives to dismissing Trump's hush money conviction
item.description: Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg’s (D) office opposes dismissing President-elect Trump’s hush money charges but would accept halting the proceedings while he is in office, according to court documents made public Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, NewsNation

item.title: Justice Department ignored some policies when seizing reporters' phone records, watchdog finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Federal prosecutors sidestepped some Justice Department rules when they seized the phone records or emails of reporters as part of media leak investigations during the Trump administration, according to a new watchdog report being released as the aggressive practice of hunting for
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER and ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden stakes out economic legacy at Brookings as Trump readies takeover
item.description: President Biden on Tuesday made the case for the strength of his economic legacy as he prepared to leave office next month, arguing President-elect Trump would be inheriting a desirable situation and warning of the risks of the incoming administration’s proposals.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Elon Musk warns Republicans against standing in Trump's way — or his
item.description: Donald Trump’s second term comes with the specter of the world’s richest man serving as his political enforcer.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Florida State Rep. Susan Valdes, representing parts of Hillsborough County, switches political parties
item.description: State Rep. Susan Valdes, who represents Florida's 64th District, including parts of Hillsborough County, switched political parties, the Florida House of Representatives announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, NewsNation

item.title: Michigan Democrats look toward a future that some hope includes Pete Buttigieg
item.description: MONROE, Mich. (AP) — In a packed union hall outside Detroit, a worker shifts the conversation from policy to the personal, quizzing Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg on his knowledge of Michigan, the state he only recently started calling home.
item.dc:creator: JOEY CAPPELLETTI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Here's how the US is countering the Islamic State group during Syria's upheaval
item.description: The U.S. has had troops in Syria for the last decade to battle IS. The tumult following a rebel offensive that toppled Assad has raised fears of an Islamic State resurgence.
item.dc:creator: LOLITA C. BALDOR, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Nevada adds blockchain security to prevent repeat of 'fake electors' mischief
item.description: Nevada has integrated blockchain technology into its election certification process to add even more security to its procedures, the Nevada Secretary of State's Office announced on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: The US believes journalist Austin Tice is alive after disappearing in Syria in 2012, Biden says
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden said Sunday that the U.S. government believes missing American journalist Austin Tice, who disappeared 12 years ago near the Syrian capital, is alive and that Washington is committed to bringing him home after Bashar Assad’s ouster from power in Damascus.
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER and AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Trump voices support for RFK Jr's vaccine views, suggests Kennedy will research debunked autism link
item.description: “When you look at some of the problems, when you look at what’s going on with disease and sickness in our country, something’s wrong,” Trump said on "Meet The Press.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, NewsNation

item.title: NYC mayor will not completely rule out switch to Republican Party
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- New York Democratic Mayor Eric Adams sent shockwaves through the political scene Friday morning after refusing to rule out running for another term as a Republican.
item.dc:creator: Henry Rosoff, PIX 11

item.title: Elon Musk funded a super PAC comparing Trump’s position on abortion to Ruth Bader Ginsburg’s
item.description: Elon Musk was the sole funder of a super PAC that focused on advertising likening Donald Trump’s stance on abortion to that of late Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Minneapolis City Council member Emily Koski joins mayor’s race
item.description: She joins Minnesota DFL Sen. Omar Fateh and the Rev. DeWayne Davis of Plymouth Congregational Church in challenging Mayor Jacob Frey, who’s running for reelection.
item.dc:creator: Megan Burks, MPR News
